title: Forbidden error when adding Google Gemini API credential
symptom: When trying to add the Google Gemini API credential, n8n returns a 'Forbidden' error message, preventing successful saving of the credential.
applies_when: API key restrictions are in place
not_this_if: API key is unrestricted and still fails
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google Gemini API must be enabled in the Google Cloud project, and the API key must be properly restricted to allow access to it. If the API is not enabled or the restrictions are not set correctly, n8n will not be able to authenticate successfully.
fix_steps: Enable the 'Gemini API' in the Google Cloud library
Restrict the API key to the 'Generative Language API' in the API Key Restrictions list
Save the changes and try adding the credential again
agent_instruction: Enable the Gemini API and restrict the API key accordingly in Google Cloud.
